description: Create a two-column content slide on private equity valuation multiple expectations with a vertical bar chart on the left and key takeaway bullets on the right.

header.headline: At 63%, the majority of surveyed PE professionals expect valuation multiples paid to (slightly) decrease in 2019
header.sub: Expected development of valuation multiples – 2019 vs. 2018 [%]

main.title: "How do you expect valuation multiples paid during M&A transactions with PE involvement to develop in 2019?"

items.text: 63% of PE professionals expect the level of valuation multiples to decrease in 2019, a considerable change from 2018 when most respondents still expected stable to slightly increasing multiples
Only 8% of surveyed PE professionals expect valuation multiples paid during M&A transactions with PE involvement to increase throughout 2019
29% of participants expect valuation multiples paid during M&A transactions with PE involvement to stay the same
